title: AN ACT NAMING THE SAN NICOLASГўВЂВ”SOLSONA PORTION OF THE ILOCOS NORTEГўВЂВ”APAYAO ROAD AS THE JOSEFA LLANES ESCODA NATIONAL HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 4085 / 103 OG No. 5964 (Sept. 17, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9463, May 15, 2007 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE SAN NICOLASГўВЂВ”SOLSONA PORTION OF THE ILOCOS NORTEГўВЂВ”APAYAO ROAD AS THE JOSEFA LLANES ESCODA NATIONAL HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. This Act shall be known as the "Josefa Llanes Escoda National Highway Act".

SEC. 2. The San NicolasГўВЂВ”Solsona portion of the Ilocos NorteГўВЂВ”Apayao Road starting from Km. Post 484+000 to Km. Post 524+000 in the Province of Ilocos Norte is hereby named as the Josefa Llanes Eecoda National Highway.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6, 2005 and February 19, 2007 respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 15 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
